publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-10-29 00:09:53 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Miscellaneous documents include two letters to Hiram White from Henry W. Sage (Ithaca) discussing payment of a note and for a horse, a liquor license granted to Hiram White and a receipt from a New York liquor dealer, and four letters from Civil War soldiers J. M. Brown, Royal S. White, Herman Sawyer and Captain G. V. White discussing war clothing allotment, duties, salary, souvenirs, battles, and recruits. Schuyler County.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Miscellaneous documents include two letters to Hiram White from Henry W. Sage (Ithaca) discussing payment of a note and for a horse, a liquor license granted to Hiram White and a receipt from a New York liquor dealer, and four letters from Civil War soldiers J. M. Brown, Royal S. White, Herman Sawyer and Captain G. V. White discussing war clothing allotment, duties, salary, souvenirs, battles, and recruits. Schuyler County.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: White family papers, #6029. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.geogname: Schuyler County (N.Y.) -- Social life and customs.
controlaccess.subject: United States -- History -- Civil War, 1861-1865 -- Personal narratives.

did.unittitle: From Henry W. Sage & Co. (Ithaca, N.Y.) to Hiram White (West Cayuta, N.Y.).
From Henry W. Sage (Ithaca, N.Y.) to Hiram White (West Cayuta, N.Y.).
Town of Cayuta, Schuyler County, N.Y.,

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: License granted to Hiram White of Cayuta to sell liquor by the Commissioners of Excise. (two similar but not identical pcs.)

did.unittitle: From Watson Harderbeyle, dealer in liquor (N.Y. City) to Hiram White (West Cayuta, N.Y.).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Discusses receipt of payment and wares on hand.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Of Hiram White for intoxication, Elmira, N.Y.; signed Hiram Potter, justice.

did.unittitle: From J.M. Brown (Camp Seward, near Rockville, Maryland) to his wife.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Discusses his clothing allotment, the weather, his duties and his salary. Back sheet contains a pencil sketch of the inside of his tent.

did.unittitle: From Royal S. White (Alexandria, Va.) to William B. White.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Relates plans to travel down river to Ft. Monroe, discusses a shipment of souvenirs to Havanna, N.Y., and the possibility of being in the battle of Yorktowne.

did.unittitle: From Herman Sawyer (Son-in-law of Hiram), (Newburn, N.C.),

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: To someone in care of William B. White, his brother-in-law, asking someone to care for his money.

did.unittitle: From Captain G.V. White (Albany, N.Y.) to William White (Cortland, N.Y.).
